notes: Ratios as decimals. Amounts in EUR (converted from EUR millions in PDF). TLAC3a granular ranking extracted from PDF (the EBA cell-level export aggregates Rank 2 + Rank 4 under a single 'no-rank' line — manual entry overrides). KM2 + TLAC1 left to EBA file (consolidated values). TLAC3 here is at resolution entity (individual) level: Equity (Rank 1) includes reserves, hence differs from CET1 consolidated in TLAC1. Mapping (italian SRB master scale, Dlgs 36/2018): Rank 1 = Equity, Rank 2 = Capital instruments + Subordinated Claims contractually agreed, Rank 3 = Subordinated liab not qualifying as own funds, Rank 4 = Senior Non-Preferred Debt ('strumenti di debito chirografario di secondo livello'), Rank 5 = Unsecured Claims (Senior Preferred), Rank 6 = Deposits different from those under layers IT 6 and IT 7.
